title: Embedded Engine Execution Flow
interaction_flow: AbstractConnectorTest → AbstractConnectorTest: config = Configuration.copy(connectorConfig).with(ENGINE_NAME, CONNECTOR_CLASS, OFFSET_STORE_PATH, OFFSET_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS=0).build()
AbstractConnectorTest → CountDownLatch: latch.await(5, MINUTES)  [blocks test thread]
createSourceTasks → BinlogConnector: connector.connectConnector().taskClass()  [returns MySqlConnectorTask or MariaDbConnectorTask class]
createSourceTasks → BinlogConnector: connector.connectConnector().taskConfigs(1)  [returns singleton list of props]
createSourceTasks → EngineSourceTaskContext: new EngineSourceTaskContext(taskConfig, offsetReader, offsetWriter, offsetCommitPolicy, clock, transformations)
--- TASK START (state STARTING_TASKS, in taskService thread) ---
BaseSourceTask → BinlogSourceTask: cdcSourceTaskContext = preStart(config)  [abstract, builds context]
BaseSourceTask → BinlogSourceTask: this.coordinator = start(config)  [abstract, creates ChangeEventSourceCoordinator]
BaseSourceTask → BinlogSourceTask: validateBinlogConfiguration(snapshotter, connection)  [checks ROW format, FULL row_image]
CountDownLatch → AbstractConnectorTest: latch unblocked — test resumes
--- POLLING LOOP (state POLLING_TASKS, in taskService thread per task) ---
runTasksPolling → RecordProcessor: createRecordProcessor(processorClassName, task)  [selects based on Consumer vs ChangeConsumer]
runTasksPolling → taskService: taskCompletionService.submit(new PollRecords(task, processor, state))
PollRecords → BaseSourceTask: task.connectTask().poll()  [blocks until records available]
BaseSourceTask.poll() → BinlogSourceTask: doPoll()  [abstract — reads from binlog via ChangeEventSourceCoordinator]
RecordProcessor → Consumer/ChangeConsumer: consumer.accept(record) OR handler.handleBatch(records, committer)
key_relationships: AbstractConnectorTest creates and owns AsyncEmbeddedEngine (via DebeziumEngine.Builder)
AbstractConnectorTest owns ExecutorService that runs engine.run()
AbstractConnectorTest provides Consumer<SourceRecord> to engine via builder.notifying()
AbstractConnectorTest owns consumedLines BlockingQueue bridging engine-thread to test-thread
AsyncEmbeddedEngine wraps EngineSourceConnector which wraps BinlogConnector
AsyncEmbeddedEngine wraps EngineSourceTask which wraps BinlogSourceTask
BinlogSourceTask extends BaseSourceTask extends Kafka SourceTask
BinlogConnector extends RelationalBaseSourceConnector extends Kafka SourceConnector
BinlogSourceTask.start(config) creates ChangeEventSourceCoordinator (abstract doPoll drives CDC pipeline)
PollRecords calls BaseSourceTask.poll() which dispatches to BinlogSourceTask.doPoll()
RecordProcessor (ParallelSmtBatchProcessor/ConsumerProcessor) dispatches to Consumer or ChangeConsumer callback
ConnectorCallback bridges engine lifecycle events to AbstractConnectorTest (isEngineRunning, latch)
binlog_specific_notes: BinlogConnector.taskConfigs(maxTasks): enforces maxTasks==1, returns singleton list
BinlogConnector.validateConnection(): uses Threads.runWithTimeout, runs 'SELECT version()' via BinlogConnectorConnection
BinlogSourceTask.validateBinlogConfiguration(): checks isBinlogFormatRow() and isBinlogRowImageFull() before streaming
BinlogSourceTask.validateSnapshotFeasibility(): checks earliestBinlogFilename() when no offsetContext and no snapshot
BinlogSourceTask.BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler: handles SQL states 42000 (access denied) and 3D000 (no db)
important_notes: AbstractConnectorTest is the TEST harness entry point, NOT production code. The production embedded path is engine.run() directly. The latch (CountDownLatch) synchronizes the test thread: it blocks after submitting engine.run() and unblocks when connectorCallback.taskStarted() fires. The consumer lambda in AbstractConnectorTest bridges the engine's polling thread to the test's consumedLines BlockingQueue. doPoll() in BinlogSourceTask is abstract — concrete implementations (MySqlConnectorTask, MariaDbConnectorTask) read from binlog via ChangeEventSourceCoordinator. Offset commits happen via BaseSourceTask.commit() (called by Kafka Connect or the embedded engine) setting shouldPerformCommit flag, then performCommit() is called at the next poll() entry.
